source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in Figure, there is a charge $+q$ at a distance from an uncharged conducting sphere. Find the electric potential $\phi$ of the sphere.

likely needs at least two reasoning stages: identify the relevant geometric quantity from the figure, then derive/select the sphere potential
